whats_new.title: Oracle recommends creating Extract for per-PDB capture rather than Root Level Extract
whats_new.description: Setting up Extract with root level access using common user c##ggadmin is not recommended, except when configuring Extract for downstream mining.

behavior_changes.title: Bug 38080969: Generic - Extract should fail with Parse error when second BRDIR is present in the Extract param file
behavior_changes.description: Extract will not allow multiple BRDIR entries in the parameter file. If more than one BRDIR parameter is defined, then Extract will exit with a parse error.

behavior_changes.title: Bug 37909236: MariaDB - Remove the requirement for MariaDB binlog_annotate_row_events=OFF
behavior_changes.description: Starting with this version of Oracle GoldenGate, the requirement to set binlog_annotate_row_events to OFF has been removed for MariaDB.

deprecated.title: FORMATASCII, FORMATXML, FORMATSQL Parameters are Desupported
deprecated.description: The FORMATASCII , FORMATXML , and FORMATSQL Extract parameters have been desupported. Use the OUTPUTFORMAT parameter instead of these parameters in the Extract parameter file.
